title: Mason Lee Valentine Cookies
ingredients: ½ cup ground cocoa powder (high-quality recommended)
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Line cookie sheets with parchment paper.
Cream butter and sugars until fluffy. Beat in eggs.
In a separate bowl, whisk together flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, baking powder, and salt. Add dry ingredients to creamed mixture and mix well. Stir in chocolate chips and vanilla.
Roll dough into balls and place on prepared cookie sheets. Bake 10 minutes. Let cookies rest on the sheet for 1 minute, then transfer to a flat surface to cool.

When Mason was a little boy, he requested that I make a new cookie – my standard chocolate chip cookies but with a chocolate cookie base. Mason Lee Valentine cookies were born! Variations include adding ½ tsp peppermint extract, crushed candy canes, and chocolate chips. Or, mint extract and mint chips. Or, add nuts.
